Klasse ActivityLogResource

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.resource.ActivityLogResource
@ApplicationScoped @Path("/api/activity-logs") @Produces("application/json") public class ActivityLogResource extends Object
REST resource for reading activity logs and CSV export (FR-08, FR-16). Activity log entries are created automatically by the DeviceResource on state changes.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    ActivityLogResource()
    Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    exportCsv(Long userId)
    Exports the activity log as a CSV file (FR-16).
    jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response
    getLogs(Long deviceId, Long userId)
    Returns activity log entries.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • ActivityLogResource

      public ActivityLogResource()
      Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.

  • Methodendetails

    • getLogs

      @GET public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response getLogs(@QueryParam("deviceId") Long deviceId, @QueryParam("userId") Long userId)
      Returns activity log entries. Provide deviceId to filter by a specific device, or userId to retrieve all logs for a user's devices.
      Parameter:
      deviceId - optional filter by device ID
      userId - optional filter by user ID (retrieves logs for all their devices)
      Gibt zurück:
      list of log entries

    • exportCsv

      @GET @Path("/export") @Produces("text/csv") public jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response exportCsv(@QueryParam("userId") Long userId)
      Exports the activity log as a CSV file (FR-16). Use userId to export all logs for a user's devices.
      Parameter:
      userId - the user whose logs to export
      Gibt zurück:
      CSV file download
